summary: End-to-end testing of XPDC Freight Forwarding landing page. Backend pytest suite (7 tests) covers /api/health and /api/inquiry validation + happy path for Air Freight/FCL/LCL. Frontend Playwright covers preloader, hero, theme toggle, language toggle (incl. localStorage persistence), all three service inquiry buttons, header Get Quote, modal Cancel, empty-submit validation toast, full happy-path submit with loading state + success toast, tracking section (short input error + long input mock result), and footer mailto link. All 7 backend tests pass; all 15 frontend scenarios pass.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py: logger is used inside submit_inquiry (line 85) but defined at module level AFTER the route handler (line 127). This works at runtime due to late binding, but reads poorly — move logger setup above route definitions.

backend/server.py: /api/inquiry catches httpx.RequestError but not generic Exception. Any unexpected error (e.g., upstream timeout edge case, JSON parse) would 500. Consider broader try/except returning a structured error.
backend/server.py: MongoDB client is initialized at import time though it is unused (no DB persistence per product requirement). Either remove the connection or document why it is kept.
Inquiry form fields full_name & company etc. use data-testid='inquiry-name' (not 'inquiry-full-name'); naming is slightly inconsistent with backend field name. Cosmetic only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_xpdc_api.py uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Upstream XPDC URL currently returns 404 — this is expected and our API still returns success:true as designed. Inquiry form field testids use 'inquiry-name' (not full-name). Sonner toasts auto-dismiss in ~4s — poll quickly after submit. Scene3D WebGL takes ~5-7s to settle after page load before clicking; preloader runs ~2s. Sonner emits a couple of harmless THREE deprecation warnings in console.
verified_flows: POST /api/inquiry Air Freight valid -> 200 {success:true, inquiry_id, upstream_status:int}
Lang toggle EN->ID swaps 'Services'->'Layanan' and 'Global freight.'->'Logistik global.', persists via localStorage xpdc-lang
Air/FCL/LCL inquiry buttons each open modal with matching service title
Empty submit shows toast 'Submission failed — Please complete the required fields.'
Valid submit: button label becomes 'Submitting…', modal closes, toast 'Inquiry sent — Our team will reach out shortly.'
Tracking <5 chars: shows 'We couldn't find that reference' error inside tracking-result
Tracking >4 chars: shows mock 'In-transit · ETA 03 days · last seen Singapore HUB'
Header Get Quote opens inquiry modal
